name: Baked Beans (Kens)
recipeIngredient: 6 1 pound cans baked beans, 2 cups drained
1 pound thick sliced bacon, cooked, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large crockpot.
2. Cook on low heat for 6 hours. Although the beans are fully cooked at the start, allowing them to cook longer will help flavors blend together more effectively.
3. Adjust seasoning as desired, adding cayenne and habanero powder for an extra kick if preferred.
